calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Steven H. Bovarnick, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Shun Lin Chow, Trustee of the Chow/Fu Trust, and for plaintiff Zhen Fu, Trustee of the Chow/Fu Trust.
Shun Lin Chow was placed under oath and examined.
Amended Default was entered against defendant on January 29, 2009.
Doe defendant were dismissed on Junuary 26, 2007.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Shin Lin Chow and Zhen Fu, Trustees of the Chow/Fu Trust, and against the Defaulted Defendant Crow Bar, Inc., a California corporation as follows:

Holdover Damages - $12,375.00.
Attorney Fees - $12,122.50.
Costs - $1,569.92.
Other (Property Damage) - $1,853.89, for a total judgment in the amount of $27,921.31.

Additionally, plaintiffs Shun Lin Chow and Zhen Fu, Trustees of the Chow/Fu Trust are entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 401 Broadway, San Francisco, CA. The lease is forfeited.

Furthermore, the $5,000.00 undertaking posted by plaintiffs on March 12, 2007 shall be released by plaintiffs, together with any accrued interest.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Order Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-22-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. (302/PJM/KD) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
